typical_monthly_usd: $1,200-$2,500 for mid-tier SMB bundle; ~$800 rep target package
min_ad_spend_usd: Bundled into invoice; ~$300-$500/mo ad spend inside packages
cancellation_policy: Phone-only cancellation (email rejected), 15-day written notice required, customers report 1+ hr hold times and denied cancellations even with proper notice
asset_ownership: Hibu retains website, domain, ad accounts, GBP access, creative. $250/mo ransom fee reported to keep site post-cancellation
known_pain_points: Blended invoice obscures ad spend vs management fee
Customer does not own website after cancellation
No reporting transparency on Google Ads performance
pros: Bundled stack (website + SEO + ads + listings) under one vendor
Outside sales rep gives face-to-face support
Low entry barrier for businesses with no in-house marketing
cons: No conversion tracking on client site (no GA4/GTM/Meta Pixel verified on Koffman site)
iPromote display network is proprietary; low quality vs Google Display Network
Generic templates; no vertical specialty for auto repair or collision
Backlink profile = directory spam (superpages, dexknows, yellowpages, factmags, egyptiandirectory, etc.)
koffman_relevance: Current vendor for AR + CR website, SEO, Google Ads, display. Site has zero standard pixels (no GA4/GTM/Meta Pixel/Google Ads conversion tag), only iPromote pixel. SEMrush shows 0 paid keywords detected = Google Ads either dormant, brand-only, or below detection threshold. Backlink profile is 100% directory spam from Hibu submission kit. Would be fully replaced by PSG engagement.
uncertain: base_monthly_low_usd exact floor for solo services
